label: bedtime routine
parentPain: bedtime turns into one more negotiation
gentleGoal: help the child practice the steps of winding down
storySkill: choosing pajamas, brushing teeth, picking one book, and saying goodnight
safePhrase: make bedtime feel familiar before it begins

label: potty training
parentPain: potty practice feels stressful for everyone
gentleGoal: help the child rehearse listening to body signals
storySkill: noticing the signal, walking to the potty, trying calmly, and celebrating effort
safePhrase: turn potty practice into a calm little quest

label: toothbrushing
parentPain: toothbrushing turns into a nightly struggle
gentleGoal: help the child practice the brushing sequence
storySkill: wet brush, tiny toothpaste, brush top and bottom, rinse, smile
safePhrase: make the brushing steps feel like a mission

label: sharing
parentPain: playdates get tense around favorite toys
gentleGoal: help the child practice taking turns
storySkill: holding a favorite toy, naming a turn, waiting, and trading back kindly
safePhrase: practice sharing language before the playdate

label: big feelings
parentPain: big feelings arrive faster than words
gentleGoal: help the child rehearse a calm-down plan
storySkill: naming the feeling, breathing slowly, asking for help, and trying again
safePhrase: give big feelings a story-shaped plan

label: morning routine
parentPain: getting out the door takes forever
gentleGoal: help the child practice a predictable morning sequence
storySkill: getting dressed, eating breakfast, shoes on, backpack ready
safePhrase: make mornings feel like a sequence they know

label: separation anxiety
parentPain: goodbyes feel hard at daycare or school
gentleGoal: help the child rehearse a loving goodbye routine
storySkill: hug, hand squeeze, grown-up comes back, brave next step
safePhrase: practice the goodbye before the real goodbye

label: screen-time transition
parentPain: turning off the screen sparks resistance
gentleGoal: help the child rehearse stopping and switching activities
storySkill: one more minute, pause, say goodbye to the show, choose the next activity
safePhrase: make the next step easier to picture

label: listening
parentPain: simple instructions need repeating again and again
gentleGoal: help the child practice hearing one clear instruction
storySkill: look, listen, repeat the step, and do one thing at a time
safePhrase: turn listening into a clear story cue
